data.title: Reply at NVIDIA GTC: Digital Twins and Physical AI Driving the Next Stage of Industrial Value Creation
data.description: In Turin, Italy, Reply [EXM, STAR: REY] is set to attend NVIDIA GTC held from March 16 to 19, 2026 in San Jose, California. They will demonstrate how businesses can enhance production and logistics operations, expand robotics capabilities, and boost industrial efficiency through digital twin tech and physical AI. The event is a key global gathering for AI professionals, attracting over 30,000 attendees and 1..

data.title: Solana's 'Precious Metal' Tease Evokes Curiosity As SOL Spikes 4%
data.description: Solana's official X account created buzz within the community by likening the cryptocurrency to a "precious metal" in a recent post on Thursday. The teaser, which featured metal bars arranged in the shape of the Solana logo, referenced Phantom wallet's concept of "precious metal maxxing." The tweet received significant attention, with Solana hinting at a trend called "Solanamaxxing." When questioned if the "intern" was participating in this trend, the account replied affirmatively. The post also showcased various custom metal-themed artworks. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI-HealthTech Innovator Humata Health Partners with AccuKnox for Zero Trust CNAPP
data.description: A tech company based in Menlo Park, California, Humata Health, recently revealed a collaboration with AccuKnox. This partnership aims to enhance security measures for Humata Health's SaaS platform by integrating AccuKnox's Code to Cognition Security platform. The move is geared towards fortifying the cloud-based application protection system for better security. This step signifies Humata Health’s proactive approach to ensuring data safety and protecting its technology. The partnership reflects a strategic decision to invest in cutting-edge security solutions.

data.title: Sigenergy Inaugurates Nantong Smart Energy Center, Pioneering "AI in All" Strategy and Next-Gen Energy Portfolio
data.description: In Nantong, Jiangsu Province, China, on March 13, 2026, Sigenergy unveiled the Sigenergy Nantong Smart Energy Center. The inauguration signifies a significant step in the company's worldwide expansion. The celebration hosted approximately 2,000 attendees, including guests from various locations.

data.title: Small Business Trends (2026): Registered Agents Inc Highlights State-by-State Formation Data by Expert Consumers
data.description: In the latest report released on March 13, 2026, by Expert Consumers, an analysis of small business trends in the United States has been conducted. The review focuses on the performance of Registered Agents Inc, particularly noting its comprehensive state-by-state business formation data and innovative monthly reporting approach. This highlights the company's effectiveness in providing valuable insights into small business operations throughout the country.

data.title: Former JP Morgan and Dresdner Kleinwort Traders Launch Crypto Prop Firm After Paying Out USD2.5 Billion in Fintech
data.description: Velotrade, a company established by ex-institutional derivatives traders from major financial institutions like JP Morgan and Dresdner, has ventured into the crypto-funded trading sector. Their entry into this market in Hong Kong on March 13, 2026, signals a strategic move towards leveraging institutional expertise in finance with a focus on the cryptocurrency realm. The platform is designed with a fresh rule set for crypto traders, aiming to provide a robust foundation for their operations. This development marks a significant shift in the industry landscape, introducing new opportunities and expertise.

data.title: Klarna Board Chair Michael Moritz Acquires 3.47 Million Shares for $50 Million
data.description: In recent disclosures, Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) unveiled transactions by its Chair of the Board of Directors and Chief Product & Design Officer as per the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Form 3. Specifically, Michael Moritz, the Chairman, acquired 3,472,845 ordinary shares during March 3 to March 11, 2026, totaling $49,913,138.73 through an associated entity. Furthermore, David Fock, the Chief Product & Design Officer, also made a purchase, yet the specific details were not provided in the summary.

data.title: Hungry Studio’s Block Blast! Reinforces Its Position Among the Free Mobile Games Players Turn to Most
data.description: In Singapore, Block Blast! remains a top choice for mobile gamers globally, with a significant number of players consistently engaging with the free game.
